overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a muddy Old West town at night. The character passes a horse-drawn wagon and proceeds along the main street lined with wooden buildings and gas street lamps, approaching a white church on a hill.

scene_state.functional_zone: outskirts of western town with warehouse and camp

events.description: horse-drawn wagon passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the muddy road toward the town center

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon moving from right to left, passing the character

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with warm lantern light glowing from windows and chimney
canvas camping tents with campfire glow visible in the distance
covered wagon with driver and horses moving along the road
dark silhouetted mountains against the night sky in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the outskirts of a Western town at night, with the character walking along a muddy dirt road toward a large wooden warehouse. A horse-drawn wagon passes by on the right, and red camp tents are visible in the distance to the left. The sky is overcast with dark storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of western town with commercial buildings

events.description: character passes the warehouse and enters the main street of the town
pedestrians appear walking along the street and sidewalks

agents.ego_description: character walking down the center of the muddy main street between wooden buildings

notable_agents.action: townsfolk in white shirt and vest walking toward the character on the right side of the street

entered.detail: two-story wooden saloon with porch and lit windows on the left side
wooden storefront with porch and steps on the right side
tall black street lamp with warm yellow gas light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main street of the Western town, passing between wooden commercial buildings including a saloon on the left and general store on the right. Cast iron street lamps illuminate the muddy road. Townsfolk begin to appear, walking along the street and sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: town center approaching the church district

events.description: white church building becomes visible on the hill ahead

agents.ego_description: character continuing down the main street toward the church on the hill

entered.detail: white wooden church with steeple and lit windows situated on a rocky hill
wooden building with sign and porch on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the town center as the street begins to ascend slightly toward a prominent white church on a rocky hill ahead. Wooden commercial buildings line both sides, and the street lamps continue to provide warm illumination against the dark overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential district with church and cottages

events.description: character passes the church and enters the residential area with more trees

agents.ego_description: character walking past the church and continuing through the residential neighborhood

entered.detail: large mature tree with spreading branches in the center of view
small wooden house with lit windows and porch on the right
wooden picket fence surrounding the church cemetery

segments.scene_description: The character passes the white church on the left, moving into a more residential area with wooden cottages and increased vegetation including a large oak tree. The street continues to wind through the neighborhood with wooden fences and additional street lamps visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the muddy outskirts of a Western town into its illuminated center and finally toward a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins on a dirt road under dark storm clouds, passing a horse-drawn wagon and red camp tents as the character approaches a large wooden warehouse. As the camera enters the main street, the environment shifts to a bustling commercial hub where cast iron street lamps cast a warm glow over a saloon, a general store, and passing townsfolk. The scene then ascends a slight incline through the town center toward a prominent white church perched on a rocky hill. Finally, the camera passes the church and winds into a residential area characterized by wooden cottages, fences, and a large oak tree.
